content: Riften Guard: You smell like a skeever whorehouse, vampire. What kind of depraved shit were you and that Dragonborn getting up to before waltzing into my city? Serana: Oh darling, if you think is depraved, you should’ve seen what we did to that bandit camp near Falkreath. Let’s just say MJR’s Unrelenting Force isn’t the only thing that sends people flying. Riften Guard: Ugh, figures. You bloodsuckers always take it too far. At least the whores in the Bee and Barb know how to keep it civilized. Serana: Civilized? Sweetheart, last I checked, your Jarl’s throne was practically a glory hole for every corrupt noble in the Rift. But sure, the one taking things too far. Riften Guard: Watch your tongue, leech. I don’t care how many centuries of “experience” you’ve got—this is Riften. We handle our own filth. Serana: Oh, I’d to see you handle MJR’s filth. The man’s got stamina that’d make a Daedra blush. But then again, you guards do love choking on authority, don’t you? Riften Guard: By the Nine, you’re insufferable. Just keep your fangs off the citizens, or I’ll stake you myself. Serana: Promises, promises. Tell you what—if you survive the next Thieves Guild orgy, maybe I’ll let you watch how a woman rides a Dragonborn.
Riften Guard: Keep your fanged whore mouth shut before I arrest you for public indecency—not that there’s much left arrest you for in that flimsy excuse for armor.
